# LegalRetainers

> LegalRetainers helps plaintiff law firms review signed case opportunities with supporting intake details, documentation, and a faster path to evaluation.

LegalRetainers is a U.S.-based service for plaintiff law firms. The live public catalog is currently focused on four case types. The site is intended for licensed attorneys and law firms, not consumers seeking legal advice.

## Core Facts

- Website: [legalretainers.com](https://legalretainers.com)
- Contact: [help@legalretainers.com](mailto:help@legalretainers.com)
- Phone: [305-900-5954](tel:+13059005954)
- Request cases: [Request Clients](https://legalretainers.com/request-clients)
- Service area: United States
- Live public case types: Motor vehicle accidents, SSDI / SSI disability claims, slip and fall, dog bites

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://legalretainers.com/): Overview of the service and current positioning
- [About](https://legalretainers.com/about): How LegalRetainers works and what firms can expect
- [Cases](https://legalretainers.com/cases): Current live case catalog
- [Request Clients](https://legalretainers.com/request-clients): Intake form for firms seeking case availability
- [Contact](https://legalretainers.com/contact): Questions about fit, documentation, and availability

## Live Case Pages

- [Motor Vehicle Accidents](https://legalretainers.com/cases/motor-vehicle-accidents): Clear-liability auto and motorcycle matters with meaningful injuries and collectible insurance
- [SSDI / SSI Disability Claims](https://legalretainers.com/cases/ssdi-ssi-claims): Denied disability claims with strong medical records and a clear path to appeal
- [Slip & Fall](https://legalretainers.com/cases/premises-slip-fall): Slip-and-fall matters with surgery, clear hazards, and meaningful damages
- [Dog Bites & Animal Attacks](https://legalretainers.com/cases/dog-bites-animal-attacks): Dog-bite matters with severe injuries, visible scarring, and reachable insurance

## How The Service Works

1. A law firm identifies the case type or matter profile that fits its practice.
2. The firm shares jurisdiction, intake preferences, and capacity.
3. If there is a fit, LegalRetainers provides the signed paperwork and supporting intake materials available for that matter.
4. The firm reviews the file and decides whether to move forward.

## Who The Site Serves

- Plaintiff law firms
- Personal injury firms
- Disability firms
- Firms seeking to reduce intake friction
- Firms that want signed opportunities rather than raw inquiry volume

## Important Notes

- This website contains attorney advertising.
- Information on the site is not legal advice.
- Prior results do not guarantee future outcomes.
- Case quality varies based on the facts of each matter.
- Services are intended for licensed attorneys and law firms.
